title: S&P 500 Hits Nine Straight Weeks Up. Micron Joins $1 Trillion Club.
script: The S&P 500 just logged its ninth straight week of gains — its longest win streak since 2004. The index closed at a new all-time high of 7,580. Powering the rally: Micron Technology just crossed $1 trillion in market cap for the first time in its history. From RAM chips in Boise, Idaho to a trillion-dollar giant. May 2026 is the best month on Wall Street since 2020.
